basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Joint Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Indore website. The last date to submit the application form is 01-08-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics, Astronomy / B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) in Physics / or Applied Physics, Astronomy, Space Science, M.Tech./M.S. (by research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering, Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, Valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/JEST score or any national level examinations conducted by Central government departments and their agencies and institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc.
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Physics, Astronomy / B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) in Physics / or Applied Physics, Astronomy, Space Science OR M.Tech./M.S. (by research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering with Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. Valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/JEST score or any national level examinations conducted by Central government departments and their agencies and institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 Per Month (plus HRA as per norms)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Joint Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore is 01 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Sc. in Physics, Astronomy or equivalent, or a B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) degree, or an M.Tech./M.S./M.E. in relevant engineering fields with a minimum of 60% marks and a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET/JEST score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Joint Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Joint Research Fellow (JRF) position is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000, along with HRA as per norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the IIT Indore JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official IIT Indore website or the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Joint Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. What are the key documents required for the application?
faq.answer: Candidates will need to upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and relevant educational certificates in the prescribed format during the online application process.
